info.title: CodeGenTools
info.description:
2021 Ruan van Maarleveld
lambda     Generates a Lambda
angular    Generates Angular Components or Pages
package    Generates a Shared Package
infra      Generates Infrastructure Cloudformation Scripts with DynamoDB
creation as a template
setup      Sets the defaults for this tool
open       Opens the current project in Visual Studio
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.
